title.rendered: #GiftsforGood ???? A Hashtag for Holiday Shopping That Benefits Nonprofits

content.rendered:
According to PayPal Holiday Research 2017, 63% of consumers are more likely to shop from a store that will donate a percentage of their proceeds to a cause. #GiftsforGood is a hashtag campaign meant to help consumers find holiday gifts that benefit good causes:

Nonprofits ???? Use #GiftsforGood on social media to promote your holiday gift programs.
Consumers ???? Browse #GiftsforGood and purchase gifts for friends and family members.
Do-gooders ???? RT and share the #GiftsforGood hashtag.

By holiday shopping at online stores that benefit nonprofits or by purchasing tribute gifts from nonprofits, consumers can channel millions of dollars into the nonprofit sector. Thank you and happy holidays from Nonprofit Tech for Good!
